entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: The general process of conducting research in the field of agriculture to improve performance.

entities.name: IMPACT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: Exercises and techniques used to estimate technology adoption and economic rates of return to evaluate research performance.

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY ADOPTION
entities.description: The rate at which new agricultural technologies are accepted and used.

entities.name: ECONOMIC RATES OF RETURN
entities.description: Financial metrics used to measure the return on research investments.

entities.name: RESEARCH INVESTMENTS
entities.description: Public funds spent on agricultural research.

entities.name: ICAR
entities.description: The Indian Council of Agricultural Research, where impact assessment exercises have been conducted.

entities.name: ACCOUNTABILITY
entities.description: The obligation of research organizations to report on the judicious use of public funds.

entities.name: LEARNING OBJECTIVES
entities.description: Goals focused on institutional learning to improve research effectiveness.

entities.name: RESEARCH PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall effectiveness and output of agricultural research organizations.
